steps.title: Spot the contrast
steps.content: The word Instead opposes two ideas: Marzan “makes up his designs as he weaves” (spontaneous, unplanned). The missing word must describe what he lacks before starting — the opposite of improvisation.

steps.title: Match the opposite
steps.content: Intention for means a specific plan for the final result. Since he improvises as he works, he cannot begin with a predetermined intention. The other three describe emotions, copying, or acceptance — unrelated to spontaneous versus planned work. That matches choice A — A is correct.
